name: io.github.lildaddyo/braintube-mcp
title: BrainTube
description: Search everything you save: YouTube, articles, podcasts, PDFs, Notion, Obsidian. X-BrainTube-Token or OAuth 2.0 (PKCE) auth.

headers.name: X-BrainTube-Token
headers.description: Optional — connect with a BrainTube API key from app.brain-tube.com → Settings → AI Integrations, or leave empty to sign in with OAuth 2.0 (authorization code + PKCE).
